2323120.name: Great Hopes City
2323120.description:
The main characters of the game are Boris (Cudgel) and Christopher (Ratsy). They spent most of their lives in Erebograd, where the events will unfold. But they had to leave their hometown for a year and a half - everything changed fundamentally. The protagonists will meet the new order and its founders - criminal bosses. It is here that the work on the gang will begin: and whether everything will be as rosy as written in the books, it's up to you.

Key Features:

  • Story of post-Soviet Ukraine and criminal groups. The game includes references to the existing people, groups, and situations in Ukraine of that era.

  • Main resources are Reputation and Money! They indicate your social status and unlock new stuff you can buy. Moreover, it influences the development of your city.

  • Perks that represent your style of gaming and change your experience in the world.

  • Battle game mode is a kind of tablet game, based on popular mini-games, which were addictive for players of different decades! Fight or avoid conflicts: you chose your path to make a dream come true.
